description_long: This object is a stylized fast food meal set on a rectangular wooden tray, featuring a burger in an open cardboard box, a container of golden French fries, and a disposable cup with a straw. The burger box and fry container are both made of brown paperboard with orange accents and a circular 'B' logo, suggesting branding. The burger is topped with sesame seeds and includes visible layers of lettuce, cheese, and patty. The drink cup is white with orange speckles and a matching orange lid, also bearing the 'B' logo, and is accompanied by a striped straw. The wooden tray has a natural grain pattern and serves as the base for the meal items. The overall presentation is clean, organized, and visually appealing, evoking a typical fast food restaurant meal.
description: A fast food meal consisting of a burger in a branded box, fries in a paper container, and a drink cup with a straw, all arranged on a wooden tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the burger in an open box, fries, and drink cup clearly displayed on a wooden tray.
description_view_1: Side view with the fries in the foreground, partially obscuring the burger and drink cup behind.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed side of the burger box, with the fries and drink cup on either side atop the tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the drink cup in the foreground, the burger box partially open, and fries visible in the background.
attribute_signage: No exterior building signage is visible; only product packaging features a circular 'B' logo.
attribute_logo: A circular 'B' logo is visible on the burger box, fry container, and drink cup, all in orange color and centrally placed on each item.
attribute_architectural_style: Not applicable; the object represents a meal set rather than a building, but the packaging design is contemporary fast food style with clean lines, simple branding, and a modern color palette.
